text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for training, but I don't see a trace of Fuji
Kiseki—that is, until she nearly runs into me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ack! Sorry, didn't mean to scare you! I'm kind of
in a hurry!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
One of my residents has a fever, and I've been
looking after her!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I need to get this medicine to her ASAP!
choice_data_list: At least you're not playing hooky for fun...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: We have training today! I completely forgot!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. I've been so preoccupied with taking
care of my resident that it slipped my mind...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I have to be better than this. I'll be more careful
next time, promise!
